name: Set up SmartrMail
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by SmartrMail"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://docs.smartrmail.com/en/", "children": [{"text": "contact SmartrMail"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "SmartrMail Overview"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "SmartrMail"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "is an email marketing application tool that automatically sends personalised shopping-related emails and integrates directly with Neto."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Different customer groups can be identified by categories such as:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Email engagement"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Order recency"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Purchase history"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Date/day added to your list"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Total orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Total spend"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Targeted emails can then be sent to a different cross sections of customers in your email list, including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "new sign ups"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "valued customers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "inactive subscribers and"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "customers who have purchased specific items."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Features:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automatically send personalised, curated product emails"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Compose email newsletter five times faster with in-app product lookup."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automate welcome emails, win-back campaigns, cross-sell recommendations etc."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up SmartrMail"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the SmartrMail addon and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm by clicking "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " again."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "SmartrMail will now be installed and linked to your Neto control panel. To access SmartrMail, navigate to "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Email Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Turn off Abandoned Cart Emails in Neto"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "SmartrMail can handle abandoned cart emails automatically using the Abandoned Cart Saver add-on. This add-on needs to be installed, with the "}, {"text": "Send abandoned cart customer email ", "bold": true}, {"text": "setting inactive."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If this add-on is installed already, you will still need to follow these steps to ensure Neto is not sending abandoned cart emails."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " link from the menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " link within the "}, {"text": "Add-on Store", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button beneath the "}, {"text": "Abandoned Cart Saver", "bold": true}, {"text": " option."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If you already have this module installed, continue to the next step."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Clear the "}, {"text": "Send abandoned cart customer email", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkbox to ensure Smartr Mail sends emails and not Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
